text:
Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to computer systems designed to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. These tasks include learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve at tasks by analysing data instead of following explicit instructions. Deep learning is a more advanced form of machine learning that uses complex networks to process information, similar to the human brain.

In daily life, AI is already everywhere. It powers virtual assistants like Siri and Alexa, suggests shows on streaming platforms, and helps navigate traffic in GPS apps. From email spam filters to smart home devices, AI is quietly making everyday tasks easier and more efficient.
